title: Chasing Giants: King Salmon Fishing on the Kasilof River
summary: If you’re looking for an unforgettable King Salmon fishing experience , the Kasilof River is one of Alaska’s best-kept secrets. Flowing from Tustumena Lake to Cook Inlet, this glacial-fed, drift-boat-only river provides a peaceful and productive setting for targeting massive Chinook (King) Salmon . At Kenai Fly Fish , we specialize in guided King Salmon trips on the Kasilof, using expert techniques and local knowledge to put you on the fish. Whether you’re a seasoned...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: March 13, 2025
summary: March 13, 2025: The Arctic sea ice has experienced a relatively small increase for this week at a rate of 0.79% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 1.89%), from the level on 03/06/2025 of 14.081 M km 2 to 14.193 M km 2 for this week.
